definition:
1. glad-eyed, bright-eyed , χαροποὶ λέοντες (Odyssey by Homer); θῆρες (Sophocles Tragicus):—;later, it denoted light-blue  or grayish colour , ὄμματά μοι γλαυκᾶς χαροπώτερα πολλὸν Ἀθάνας (Theocritus Poeta Bucolicus); also of the Germans, see. χαροπότης. 
2. of the eyes of youths, sparkling with joy, joyous, gladsome , [Refs 3rd c.BC, variant datesAnthology Palantina (ML)
